_comment: Example: register the lsp-mcp bridge with Claude Code to enable the codebase-discovery LSP navigation option. Merge this into ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace BOTH paths with the ABSOLUTE paths to your built binary and your config.yaml. A language server (gopls / typescript-language-server / pylsp / ...) must be installed and runnable, or the lsp_* tools will not appear and the skill falls back to grep.
